zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stacy於1492年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親John Richard Stacy26歲，母親Alice Tourney24歲。他於1510年與Jean Joan Tourney在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年10月21日在英國英格蘭艾可享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Stacy, a diminutive of Stace , a pet form of Eustace .
In some cases an American shortened and altered form of Greek Stasinopoulos, a patronymic from the personal name Stasinos .

variants.name: Stace
meanings: English (Sussex and Kent): from the Middle English personal name Stace (Latinized as Stacius), a vernacular form of Eustace . Compare Stacy .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Stacy was born in 1492, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Richard Stacy, was 26 and his mother, Alice Tourney, was 24. He married Jean Joan Tourney in 1510, in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 October 1540, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stacy est né en 1492, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Richard Stacy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Tourney, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jean Joan Tourney en 1510, à Epping, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1540, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Lui sposato Jean Joan Tourney nel 1510, nel Epping, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Stacyが1492年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父John Richard Stacyは26歳，母Alice Tourneyは24歳であった。1510年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングでJean Joan Tourneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年10月21日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stacy(이)가 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Richard Stacy(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Tourney(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에서 Jean Joan Tourney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 10월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stacy родился в 1492 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Richard Stacy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Tourney, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Joan Tourney в 1510 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1540 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
